name: Dont get crashed by 67
description: Dodge the sudden charges of 67, time your movements perfectly, and reach the finish before you get crushed. Every second counts when 67 is right behind you. There’s no room for mistakes — one wrong move and it’s over. Speed and reaction are everything. This game is perfect for all Roblox fans who love intense gameplay, challenges, and adrenaline.
instructions: Just run forward and dodge when 67 tries to crush you Keep moving avoid the attacks and don rsquo t let yourself get crushed
